steps.title: Understand the model
steps.content: The model y = 0.1x tells us that for each minute of practice, the pianist plays 0.1 piece. To find the number of pieces for a 30‑minute session, substitute x = 30 into the equation.

steps.title: Substitute and compute
steps.content: $$y = 0.1 \times 30 = 3$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
